Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Ali A. Hamidi, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff 1000 Channel Street (SF) Owner, LLC
John Gill, Esq. appearing for Defendatn One Mission Bay Owners Association

Hearing held.

Defendant offers proof to the argument whether it is compulsory or permissive for leave to file cross complaint.
Plaintiff submits to the court's tentativre ruling and responds to defendants argument.

After hearing the arguments, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ONE MISSION BAY OWNERS' ASSOCIATION A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Declaratory Relief

is DENIED.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by Linda Lee, CSR#13568; lmendel7@gmail.com; (323) 496-5303. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Continued To Jan-07-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Ali Hamidi, Esq. for Plaintiff Channel Street (SF)Owner, LLC
John Gill, Esq. for Defendant One Mission Bay Owners Association

Hearing held.
Moving party contests the continuance of the motion and requests for a tentative ruling.

Matter is discussed and argued.

After considering the arguments, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ONE MISSION BAY OWNERS' ASSOCIATION A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint For Declaratory Relief;

is continued to January 7, 2026 for the moving party to seek a trial continuance in Department 206.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
